TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: inkyasan_gong_ru_llyung_溪流與河川的地形
TEXT.citation: inkyasan_gong_ru_llyung_溪流與河川的地形. (2025, May 05). In Wikipedia [Atayal]. https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/inkyasan_gong_ru_llyung_溪流與河川的地形
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_inkyasan_gong_ru_llyung_溪流與河川的地形, title = inkyasan_gong_ru_llyung_溪流與河川的地形, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/inkyasan_gong_ru_llyung_溪流與河川的地形} }

S.FORM: mita syax na wagi, mangay qaya mtasaw thuyay ta mqyanux la! ke qani ga, sinbilan hmali na bnkis ta. syax na wagi ga,puqing na sqyanux ta. mha ni m'uraw qu qsya lga, iyat ta thuyay mqyanux. sazing ke qani ga, 'mubuy squ qnxan ta. .

mita syax na wagi, mangay qaya mtasaw thuyay ta mqyanux la! ke qani ga, sinbilan hmali na bnkis ta. syax na wagi ga,puqing na sqyanux ta. mha ni m'uraw qu qsya lga, iyat ta thuyay mqyanux. sazing ke qani ga, 'mubuy squ qnxan ta. .
S.PHON: mita s~ɕjax na waɣi, maŋaj qaja mtas~ɕaw tħujaj ta mqjanux la! ke qani ɣa, s~ɕinβilan ħmali na βnkis~ɕ ta. s~ɕjax na waɣi ɣa,puqiŋ na s~ɕqjanux ta. mħa ni mʔuraw qu qs~ɕja lɣa, ijat ta tħujaj mqjanux. s~ɕaziŋ ke qani ɣa, ʔmuβuj s~ɕqu qnxan ta. .
